name: Yarn-Wrapped Snowflake Christmas Tree Ornament White - Wondershop™
description:
Lend the perfect touch of wintry charm to your tree decor with this Yarn-Wrapped Snowflake Christmas Tree Ornament from Wondershop™. The tree ornament is shaped like a snowflake wrapped in yarn to add a charming touch to your Christmas tree, and it's finished with a shiny silver loop for easy hanging anywhere you please. Attach this ornament to your tree or hang it from a hook in any room to bring Christmas cheer.

Wondershop™: Welcome to the Wondershop.
